name: Our Version of Julia Child's Parsnip Puree
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds parsnips, peeled and sliced into 1/3-inch thick pieces
2-3 tablespoons unsalted butter, cut into bits
Salt and freshly ground white pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine the parsnips and salt with enough water to just cover them.
2. Bring to a boil and simmer for 20 to 30 minutes or until tender and two-thirds of the water has evaporated.
3. Using a food mill fitted with the fine blade or a food processor, puree the mixture.
4. Season with salt and freshly ground white pepper to taste.
5. Set the pan over another containing simmering water, cover, and let cook for 20 to 30 minutes more. (The parsnip puree improves in flavor with this additional cooking.)
Yield: 4-6 servings
